follows_local_unique_idx.name: follows_local_unique_idx
follows_local_unique_idx.where: "follows"."follower_id" is not null and "follows"."followee_id" is not null

follows_remote_followee_unique_idx.name: follows_remote_followee_unique_idx
follows_remote_followee_unique_idx.where: "follows"."follower_id" is not null and "follows"."remote_followee_id" is not null
